summary: Final retest after hero font reduction (xl:text-[3rem] + textWrap:balance). Both EN and FR hero headlines now wrap to exactly 3 lines at desktop 1440x900. All regression spot-checks pass. ALL acceptance criteria PASS.

acceptance_criteria_results.1_hero_3_lines_desktop_1440x900_EN: PASS — 3 lines (rect.height=120, lineHeight=40, fontSize=48). Wraps as 'SIMPLIFYING PEOPLE'S' / 'LIVES AND CONNECTING' / 'THEM TOGETHER'. textWrap:balance computed correctly.
acceptance_criteria_results.1_hero_3_lines_desktop_1440x900_FR: PASS — 3 lines (rect.height=120, lineHeight=40, fontSize=48). Wraps as 'SIMPLIFIER LA VIE' / 'DES GENS ET LES' / 'CONNECTER ENSEMBLE'.
acceptance_criteria_results.2_hero_tablet_768x1024_EN: PASS — 3 lines (height=120, lineHeight=40, fontSize=44), width=672, visible, readable, no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=clientWidth=768).
acceptance_criteria_results.2_hero_tablet_768x1024_FR: PASS — 3 lines (height=120, lineHeight=40, fontSize=44), no overflow.
acceptance_criteria_results.2_hero_mobile_390x844_EN: PASS — 4 lines (height=126, lineHeight=31.5, fontSize=30), width=342, readable, no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=clientWidth=390). 4 lines acceptable at small viewport per acceptance criteria.
acceptance_criteria_results.2_hero_mobile_390x844_FR: PASS — 4 lines (height=126, lineHeight=31.5, fontSize=30), no overflow.
acceptance_criteria_results.3_regression_services_cta: PASS — service-card-cta-0 is <a> with href='/#mobile' and text 'Télécharger l'app' (FR locale active at time of check) / 'Download App' (EN). Verified previously in iter16.
acceptance_criteria_results.3_regression_superapp_buttons: PASS — superapp-appstore-btn and superapp-playstore-btn both present on /services with App Store and Google Play labels.
acceptance_criteria_results.3_regression_ecosystem_download_app: PASS — Home Ecosystem section shows 7 instances of 'Télécharger l'app' (FR) [12 in EN per iter16] across 6 cards.
acceptance_criteria_results.3_regression_no_capital_Baked: PASS — 0 occurrences of standalone 'Baked' (capital B) found in body innerText. Brand spelling counts: 'bakēd'=4, lowercase 'baked'=1 (email address contact@baked.group — domain names cannot use macron, acceptable).

critical_code_review_comments: Hero.tsx leading-[1.05] is overridden by computed lineHeight=40px instead of expected ~50.4px (1.05 × 48); font-heading may have its own line-height setting. Visual 3-line wrap still correct so non-blocking, but worth verifying intent.
textWrap:'balance' inline style works in modern browsers; would be cleaner via tailwind utility text-balance if available in project config.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All hero headline acceptance criteria met. Both EN and FR fit in 3 lines @1440x900 and @768x1024; mobile @390 wraps to 4 lines without overflow which is acceptable. All regressions (services CTA, SuperApp buttons, Ecosystem cards, brand spelling) confirmed working. No further work required on hero font sizing.
rca_of_the_issue: Previous EN-fails-4-lines RCA was due to long 'CONNECTING' word at fontSize=56. Current fix to xl:text-[3rem] (48px) plus textWrap:balance produces optimal wrap: 'SIMPLIFYING PEOPLE'S / LIVES AND CONNECTING / THEM TOGETHER' — exactly 3 balanced lines. FR also benefits from balance algorithm staying at 3 lines.
